    Index

    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages

    A

    acceptCurseImmediate() - Method in class fr.uge.backpackhero.entites.Heros
     
    add(ItemInstance, Position) - Method in class fr.uge.backpackhero.item.BackPack
    Attempts to place an item at the specified anchor position.
    addEffect(Effect, int) - Method in class fr.uge.backpackhero.entites.Heros
     
    addGold(int) - Method in class fr.uge.backpackhero.item.BackPack
    Adds gold to the hero's wallet.
    addStatus(Effect, int) - Method in class fr.uge.backpackhero.entites.Ennemi
    Adds stacks of a status effect to the enemy.
    ajouterProtection(int) - Method in class fr.uge.backpackhero.entites.Heros
     
    amount() - Method in record class fr.uge.backpackhero.combat.ProtectAction
    Returns the value of the amount record component.
    applyCurseRemovalPenalty() - Method in class fr.uge.backpackhero.entites.Heros
    Applies a temporary Max HP penalty (20%) when a curse is removed.
    Armor - Record Class in fr.uge.backpackhero.item
    Represents a piece of armor that the hero can equip.
    Armor(String, List, Rarity, int, int) - Constructor for record class fr.uge.backpackhero.item.Armor
    Compact constructor with validation.
    Arrow - Record Class in fr.uge.backpackhero.item
    Represents an arrow that can be fired by a ranged weapon.
    Arrow(String, List, Rarity, int, int) - Constructor for record class fr.uge.backpackhero.item.Arrow
    Compact constructor with validation.
    AttackAction - Record Class in fr.uge.backpackhero.combat
    Represents the intention to attack.
    AttackAction(int) - Constructor for record class fr.uge.backpackhero.combat.AttackAction
    Compact constructor to validate the damage value.
    attemptPlacement(ItemInstance) - Method in class fr.uge.backpackhero.graphics.ViewGraphic
     
    attemptPlacement(ItemInstance) - Method in interface fr.uge.backpackhero.item.BackpackView
     

    B

    BackPack - Class in fr.uge.backpackhero.item
    Represents the hero's backpack grid containing placed items.
    BackPack() - Constructor for class fr.uge.backpackhero.item.BackPack
    Creates a backpack with a default unlocked area of 3x5.
    BackpackView - Interface in fr.uge.backpackhero.item
    Common interface for both Terminal and Graphical views.
    BeeQueenBehavior - Class in fr.uge.backpackhero.combat
    Defines the specific behavior for the Bee Queen enemy.
    BeeQueenBehavior() - Constructor for class fr.uge.backpackhero.combat.BeeQueenBehavior
     
    BOUTIQUE - Enum constant in enum class fr.uge.backpackhero.Mode
    The hero is currently interacting with a merchant in a shop room.
    BURN - Enum constant in enum class fr.uge.backpackhero.combat.Effect
    Burn: Deals X damage at the start of the turn.

    C

    calculateFinalScore() - Method in class fr.uge.backpackhero.entites.Heros
    Calculates total final score (Max HP + inventory value).
    choisirProchaineAction() - Method in class fr.uge.backpackhero.entites.Ennemi
    Plans the next action for the current turn.
    chooseAction() - Method in class fr.uge.backpackhero.combat.BeeQueenBehavior
    Randomly chooses an action for the Bee Queen.
    chooseAction() - Method in interface fr.uge.backpackhero.combat.EnemyBehavior
    The enemy thinks and chooses its next action based on its specific logic.
    chooseAction() - Method in class fr.uge.backpackhero.combat.FrogWizardBehavior
    Randomly selects an action for the Frog Wizard among poison, slow, or a curse.
    chooseAction() - Method in class fr.uge.backpackhero.combat.LivingShadowBehavior
    Selects an action for the Living Shadow.
    chooseAction() - Method in class fr.uge.backpackhero.combat.RatLoupBehavior
    Randomly selects an action among attack (70%), protection (20%), or curse (10%).
    CloudSword - Enum constant in enum class fr.uge.backpackhero.item.Stuff
    A legendary melee weapon.
    col() - Method in record class fr.uge.backpackhero.donjon.PositionInDungeon
    Returns the value of the col record component.
    column() - Method in record class fr.uge.backpackhero.item.Position
    Returns the value of the column record component.
    Combat - Class in fr.uge.backpackhero.combat
    Manages turn-based combat logic between the hero and enemies.
    Combat(Heros, List, CombatInteractionDelegate) - Constructor for class fr.uge.backpackhero.combat.Combat
    Initializes a combat session.
    COMBAT - Enum constant in enum class fr.uge.backpackhero.Mode
    The player is engaged in turn-based combat with one or more enemies.
    CombatInteractionDelegate - Interface in fr.uge.backpackhero.combat
    Interface allowing the combat system to initiate user interaction without directly depending on the View or Controller classes.
    CombatState - Enum Class in fr.uge.backpackhero.combat
    Represents the different possible states of a combat.
    COMMON - Enum constant in enum class fr.uge.backpackhero.item.Rarity
    Standard items, frequently encountered.
    compareTo(ScoreEntry) - Method in record class fr.uge.backpackhero.data.ScoreEntry
    Compares this entry with another for descending sort order (highest score first).
    Corridor - Record Class in fr.uge.backpackhero.donjon
    Represents an empty corridor room in the dungeon.
    Corridor() - Constructor for record class fr.uge.backpackhero.donjon.Corridor
    Creates an instance of a Corridor record class.
    cost() - Method in record class fr.uge.backpackhero.item.MagicItem
    Returns the value of the cost record component.
    cost() - Method in record class fr.uge.backpackhero.item.MeleeWeapon
    Returns the value of the cost record component.
    cost() - Method in record class fr.uge.backpackhero.item.RangeWeapon
    Returns the value of the cost record component.
    cost() - Method in record class fr.uge.backpackhero.item.Shield
    Returns the value of the cost record component.
    countManaStones() - Method in class fr.uge.backpackhero.item.BackPack
    Counts the total number of mana stones currently stored in the backpack.
    create(Stuff) - Method in class fr.uge.backpackhero.item.StuffFactory
    Creates a concrete Item object based on the provided Stuff type.
    createDungeonPhase3() - Static method in class fr.uge.backpackhero.donjon.DungeonGenerator
    Creates a complete dungeon consisting of 3 floors with increasing difficulty.
    curse() - Method in record class fr.uge.backpackhero.combat.CurseAction
    Returns the value of the curse record component.
    Curse - Enum constant in enum class fr.uge.backpackhero.item.Stuff
    A special item representing a negative effect or malus.
    Curse - Record Class in fr.uge.backpackhero.item
    Represents a curse item.
    Curse(List) - Constructor for record class fr.uge.backpackhero.item.Curse
    Creates a new curse with the given relative shape positions.
    CURSE - Enum constant in enum class fr.uge.backpackhero.item.Rarity
    * Special rarity reserved for Malice or negative effects.
    CurseAction - Record Class in fr.uge.backpackhero.combat
    Represents the intention to inflict a curse.
    CurseAction(Curse) - Constructor for record class fr.uge.backpackhero.combat.CurseAction
    Compact constructor to validate that the curse is not null.

    D

    damage() - Method in record class fr.uge.backpackhero.combat.AttackAction
    Returns the value of the damage record component.
    debuterTourCombat() - Method in class fr.uge.backpackhero.entites.Heros
    Resets energy and calculates passive protection from armor.
    decrementCursePenaltyDuration() - Method in class fr.uge.backpackhero.entites.Heros
    Decrements curse penalty duration and restores Max HP if duration ends.
    depenserEnergie(int) - Method in class fr.uge.backpackhero.entites.Heros
     
    deplacer(int, int) - Method in class fr.uge.backpackhero.Jeu
    Attempts to move the hero by a given offset and triggers room interaction.
    description() - Method in record class fr.uge.backpackhero.combat.AttackAction
    Returns a human-readable description of the attack action for the UI.
    description() - Method in record class fr.uge.backpackhero.combat.CurseAction
    Provides a human-readable description of the curse action for the UI.
    description() - Method in interface fr.uge.backpackhero.combat.EnemyAction
    Returns a textual description of the action to display to the player.
    description() - Method in record class fr.uge.backpackhero.combat.ProtectAction
    Provides a human-readable description of the protection action for the interface.
    description() - Method in record class fr.uge.backpackhero.combat.StatusEffectAction
    Provides a human-readable description of the status effect action for the UI.
    description() - Method in record class fr.uge.backpackhero.donjon.EventRoom
    Returns the value of the description record component.
    details() - Method in record class fr.uge.backpackhero.item.Armor
    Returns a human-readable description of the armor.
    details() - Method in record class fr.uge.backpackhero.item.Arrow
    Returns a human-readable description of the arrow.
    details() - Method in record class fr.uge.backpackhero.item.Curse
     
    details() - Method in record class fr.uge.backpackhero.item.Gold
     
    details() - Method in interface fr.uge.backpackhero.item.Item
    Returns a textual description of this item, explaining its behavior.
    details() - Method in record class fr.uge.backpackhero.item.MagicItem
    Returns a human-readable description of the magic item.
    details() - Method in record class fr.uge.backpackhero.item.ManaStone
    Returns a human-readable description of the mana stone.
    details() - Method in record class fr.uge.backpackhero.item.MeleeWeapon
    Returns a human-readable description of the melee weapon.
    details() - Method in record class fr.uge.backpackhero.item.RangeWeapon
    Returns a human-readable description of the ranged weapon.
    details() - Method in record class fr.uge.backpackhero.item.Shield
    Returns a human-readable description of the shield.

    DODGE - Enum constant in enum class fr.uge.backpackhero.combat.Effect
    Dodge: Prevents incoming damage X times.
    draw(Graphics2D, int, int, int, ImageLoader) - Method in record class fr.uge.backpackhero.donjon.Corridor
    Renders the room's visual representation on the screen.
    draw(Graphics2D, int, int, int, ImageLoader) - Method in record class fr.uge.backpackhero.donjon.EnemyRoom
    Draws the representative enemy sprite on the dungeon map.
    draw(Graphics2D, int, int, int, ImageLoader) - Method in record class fr.uge.backpackhero.donjon.EventRoom
    Draws the event icon on the dungeon map.
    draw(Graphics2D, int, int, int, ImageLoader) - Method in record class fr.uge.backpackhero.donjon.ExitRoom
    Draws the exit door sprite on the dungeon map.
    draw(Graphics2D, int, int, int, ImageLoader) - Method in record class fr.uge.backpackhero.donjon.GateRoom
    Draws the gate's lock icon on the dungeon map.
    draw(Graphics2D, int, int, int, ImageLoader) - Method in record class fr.uge.backpackhero.donjon.HealerRoom
    Draws the healer sprite on the dungeon map.
    draw(Graphics2D, int, int, int, ImageLoader) - Method in record class fr.uge.backpackhero.donjon.MerchantRoom
    Draws the merchant sprite on the dungeon map.
    draw(Graphics2D, int, int, int, ImageLoader) - Method in interface fr.uge.backpackhero.donjon.Room
    Renders the room's visual representation on the screen.
    draw(Graphics2D, int, int, int, ImageLoader) - Method in record class fr.uge.backpackhero.donjon.TreasureRoom
    Draws the representative treasure or the first item of the loot on the map.
    Dungeon - Class in fr.uge.backpackhero.donjon
    Represents the entire Dungeon structure.
    Dungeon(List) - Constructor for class fr.uge.backpackhero.donjon.Dungeon
    Constructs a Dungeon object.
    DungeonGenerator - Class in fr.uge.backpackhero.donjon
    Utility class responsible for generating randomized dungeon structures.

    E

    effect() - Method in record class fr.uge.backpackhero.combat.StatusEffectAction
    Returns the value of the effect record component.
    Effect - Enum Class in fr.uge.backpackhero.combat
    Represents the different status effects that can be applied to an entity (Hero or Enemy).
    ElectricWand - Enum constant in enum class fr.uge.backpackhero.item.Stuff
    An uncommon magic item.
    enemies() - Method in record class fr.uge.backpackhero.donjon.EnemyRoom
    Returns the value of the enemies record component.
    EnemyAction - Interface in fr.uge.backpackhero.combat
    A sealed interface representing a planned action ("message") that an enemy announces before executing it.
    EnemyBehavior - Interface in fr.uge.backpackhero.combat
    Interface defining the intelligence (behavior) of an enemy.
    EnemyRoom - Record Class in fr.uge.backpackhero.donjon
    Represents a room containing enemies.
    EnemyRoom(List) - Constructor for record class fr.uge.backpackhero.donjon.EnemyRoom
    Compact constructor to validate that the list of enemies is valid.
    Ennemi - Class in fr.uge.backpackhero.entites
    Represents an enemy unit in the dungeon.
    Ennemi(String, int, int, EnemyBehavior) - Constructor for class fr.uge.backpackhero.entites.Ennemi
    Constructs a new enemy with specified statistics and behavior.

    estVivant() - Method in class fr.uge.backpackhero.entites.Ennemi
     
    estVivant() - Method in class fr.uge.backpackhero.entites.Heros
     
    EventRoom - Record Class in fr.uge.backpackhero.donjon
    Represents a random encounter room where the content is revealed only upon entry.
    EventRoom(String) - Constructor for record class fr.uge.backpackhero.donjon.EventRoom
    Compact constructor to ensure the description is not null.
    executeAction(EnemyAction, Ennemi, Heros) - Method in class fr.uge.backpackhero.combat.BeeQueenBehavior
    Executes the provided action using polymorphism via a type-switch.
    executeAction(EnemyAction, Ennemi, Heros) - Method in interface fr.uge.backpackhero.combat.EnemyBehavior
    Executes the action that had been previously announced.
    executeAction(EnemyAction, Ennemi, Heros) - Method in class fr.uge.backpackhero.combat.FrogWizardBehavior
    Executes the specified action on the target or owner.
    executeAction(EnemyAction, Ennemi, Heros) - Method in class fr.uge.backpackhero.combat.LivingShadowBehavior
    Executes the chosen action using pattern matching for polymorphism.
    executeAction(EnemyAction, Ennemi, Heros) - Method in class fr.uge.backpackhero.combat.RatLoupBehavior
    Executes the chosen action using pattern matching in a switch statement.
    executerAction(Heros) - Method in class fr.uge.backpackhero.entites.Ennemi
    Executes the announced action on the specified hero.
    ExitRoom - Record Class in fr.uge.backpackhero.donjon
    Represents the room that contains the exit door.
    ExitRoom() - Constructor for record class fr.uge.backpackhero.donjon.ExitRoom
    Creates an instance of a ExitRoom record class.
    EXPLORATION - Enum constant in enum class fr.uge.backpackhero.Mode
    The player is navigating the dungeon map and moving between rooms.

    F

    finishCombat() - Method in class fr.uge.backpackhero.combat.Combat
    Cleans up combat state and generates rewards if victorious.
    Floor - Class in fr.uge.backpackhero.donjon
    Represents a single floor of the dungeon.
    Floor(Room[][], int, int) - Constructor for class fr.uge.backpackhero.donjon.Floor
    Constructs a Floor with a given map and starting coordinates.

    G

    GAGNE - Enum constant in enum class fr.uge.backpackhero.Mode
    The hero has successfully finished the dungeon floors.

    Represents a gate blocking access to another room.

    Generates a single floor with connected rooms based on difficulty.

    Retrieves the grid positions occupied by a specific item instance.

    Retrieves the current stack count of a status effect.

    GraphicEngine - Class in fr.uge.backpackhero.graphics
    Main graphical engine for rendering the game world and handling user interactions.

    Constructs the engine.

    H

    HallOfFame - Class in fr.uge.backpackhero.data
    Manages the high scores for the game.

    handleForcedCurse(Heros, Curse) - Method in interface fr.uge.backpackhero.combat.CombatInteractionDelegate
    Handles the complete interaction when an enemy forces a Curse onto the Hero.

    handleForcedCurse(Heros, Curse) - Method in interface fr.uge.backpackhero.item.BackpackView
     
    handleKeyPress(KeyboardEvent.Key) - Method in class fr.uge.backpackhero.graphics.ViewGraphic
    Processes keyboard input based on the current interaction mode.
    handleLevelUpExpansion(int) - Method in interface fr.uge.backpackhero.combat.CombatInteractionDelegate
    Triggered when the hero levels up to allow the user to choose new tiles.
    handleLevelUpExpansion(int) - Method in class fr.uge.backpackhero.graphics.ViewGraphic
     
    handleMouseClick(int, int, int, int) - Method in class fr.uge.backpackhero.graphics.ViewGraphic
    Processes mouse clicks to place items or unlock tiles in the backpack.
    hasAdjacentItem(ItemInstance, Predicate) - Method in class fr.uge.backpackhero.item.BackPack
    Determines if there is another item in the backpack that satisfies a given condition and is physically adjacent to the specified item.

    HASTE - Enum constant in enum class fr.uge.backpackhero.combat.Effect
    Haste: Increases the block amount provided by items by X.
    HealerRoom - Record Class in fr.uge.backpackhero.donjon
    Represents a room containing a healer.
    HealerRoom() - Constructor for record class fr.uge.backpackhero.donjon.HealerRoom
    Creates an instance of a HealerRoom record class.
    height() - Method in class fr.uge.backpackhero.donjon.Floor
     
    height() - Method in class fr.uge.backpackhero.item.ItemInstance
    Calculates the height of the item based on its current shape and rotation.
    Heros - Class in fr.uge.backpackhero.entites
    Main character class managing health, level progression, inventory, gold transactions, and status effect mechanics including curse penalties.
    Heros() - Constructor for class fr.uge.backpackhero.entites.Heros
    Initializes the hero with starting stats (40 HP, 3 Energy).
    hiddenRoom() - Method in record class fr.uge.backpackhero.donjon.GateRoom
    Returns the value of the hiddenRoom record component.

    I

    ImageLoader - Class in fr.uge.backpackhero.graphics
    Utility class responsible for loading and caching game images.

    IN_PROGRESS - Enum constant in enum class fr.uge.backpackhero.combat.CombatState
    The combat is still in progress.

    Indicates whether this item is classified as a piece of armor.

    Checks if a tile is available for placement (inside bounds and unlocked).

    Indicates whether this item is classified as a curse.

    Checks if a room has been explored by the hero.

    Checks if the player has finished the dungeon floors.
    isHeroTurn() - Method in class fr.uge.backpackhero.combat.Combat
     
    isManaStone() - Method in interface fr.uge.backpackhero.item.Item
    Indicates whether this item is classified as a mana stone.
    isManaStone() - Method in record class fr.uge.backpackhero.item.ManaStone
     
    isPathPossible(int, int, int, int) - Method in class fr.uge.backpackhero.donjon.Floor
    Checks if a path consisting only of traversable rooms exists to the target.
    isTraversable() - Method in record class fr.uge.backpackhero.donjon.Corridor
    Indicates whether the hero can pass through this room to reach another destination.
    isTraversable() - Method in record class fr.uge.backpackhero.donjon.GateRoom
    Indicates if the hero can pass through this room.
    isTraversable() - Method in interface fr.uge.backpackhero.donjon.Room
    Indicates whether the hero can pass through this room to reach another destination.
    Item - Interface in fr.uge.backpackhero.item
    Represents a generic item that can be placed in the hero's backpack and optionally used in combat.
    ITEM_PLACEMENT - Enum constant in enum class fr.uge.backpackhero.graphics.ViewGraphic.InteractionMode
     
    ItemInstance - Class in fr.uge.backpackhero.item
    Represents an instance of an Item in the backpack.
    ItemInstance(Item) - Constructor for class fr.uge.backpackhero.item.ItemInstance
    Creates a new instance of an Item.

    J

    Jeu - Class in fr.uge.backpackhero
    Main controller for the game logic.
    Jeu(Heros, Dungeon, ViewGraphic, ViewGraphic) - Constructor for class fr.uge.backpackhero.Jeu
    Constructs the game instance and sets the initial position.

    L

    lancerCombat(List) - Method in class fr.uge.backpackhero.Jeu
    Initializes a combat session against a list of enemies.
    LeatherCap - Enum constant in enum class fr.uge.backpackhero.item.Stuff
    A rare piece of armor.
    LEGENDARY - Enum constant in enum class fr.uge.backpackhero.item.Rarity
    Extremely powerful and scarce items.
    LEVEL_UP - Enum constant in enum class fr.uge.backpackhero.graphics.ViewGraphic.InteractionMode
     
    LivingShadowBehavior - Class in fr.uge.backpackhero.combat
    Defines the behavior for the Living Shadow enemy, a Phase 3 antagonist.
    LivingShadowBehavior() - Constructor for class fr.uge.backpackhero.combat.LivingShadowBehavior
     
    loadScores() - Method in class fr.uge.backpackhero.data.HallOfFame
    Loads the current list of scores as ScoreEntry objects.
    loot() - Method in record class fr.uge.backpackhero.donjon.TreasureRoom
    Returns the value of the loot record component.
    LOSS - Enum constant in enum class fr.uge.backpackhero.combat.CombatState
    The hero has lost (0 HP).

    M

    MagicItem - Record Class in fr.uge.backpackhero.item
    Represents a magical item that can be used in combat.
    MagicItem(String, List, Rarity, int, int, int) - Constructor for record class fr.uge.backpackhero.item.MagicItem
    Compact constructor with validation.
    main(String[]) - Static method in class fr.uge.backpackhero.Main
    Main method to start the game.
    Main - Class in fr.uge.backpackhero
    Entry point for the Backpack Hero application.
    Main() - Constructor for class fr.uge.backpackhero.Main
     
    ManaStone - Enum constant in enum class fr.uge.backpackhero.item.Stuff
    A common consumable item (implied, based on name).
    ManaStone - Record Class in fr.uge.backpackhero.item
    Represents a mana stone that can be used in combat.
    ManaStone(String, List, Rarity, int, int) - Constructor for record class fr.uge.backpackhero.item.ManaStone
    Compact constructor with validation.
    MeleeWeapon - Record Class in fr.uge.backpackhero.item
    Represents a physical weapon designed for close-quarters combat.
    MeleeWeapon(String, List, Rarity, int, int, int) - Constructor for record class fr.uge.backpackhero.item.MeleeWeapon
    Compact constructor with validation.
    MenuGuerisseur - Class in fr.uge.backpackhero
    Handles the interaction logic between the hero and the Healer.
    MenuGuerisseur() - Constructor for class fr.uge.backpackhero.MenuGuerisseur
     
    MenuMarchand - Class in fr.uge.backpackhero
    Handles the console-based interaction between the hero and the merchant.
    MerchantRoom - Record Class in fr.uge.backpackhero.donjon
    Represents a room containing a merchant with a stock of items available for sale.
    MerchantRoom(List) - Constructor for record class fr.uge.backpackhero.donjon.MerchantRoom
    Compact constructor to validate the stock and ensure mutability.
    Mode - Enum Class in fr.uge.backpackhero
    Represents the different possible states (modes) of the game.
    MouseBow - Enum constant in enum class fr.uge.backpackhero.item.Stuff
    An uncommon ranged weapon.
    moveToNextFloor() - Method in class fr.uge.backpackhero.donjon.Dungeon
    Moves the player to the next floor in the sequence.
    moveToNextFloor() - Method in class fr.uge.backpackhero.Jeu
    Manages transition to the next dungeon floor or sets the game to victory mode.

    N

    name() - Method in record class fr.uge.backpackhero.item.Armor
    Returns the value of the name record component.
    name() - Method in record class fr.uge.backpackhero.item.Arrow
    Returns the value of the name record component.

    Returns the full display name of this item.

    Returns the value of the name record component.

    Returns the value of the name record component.

    Returns the value of the name record component.
    name() - Method in record class fr.uge.backpackhero.item.RangeWeapon
    Returns the value of the name record component.
    name() - Method in record class fr.uge.backpackhero.item.Shield
    Returns the value of the name record component.
    NONE - Enum constant in enum class fr.uge.backpackhero.graphics.ViewGraphic.InteractionMode
     
    notifier(String) - Method in class fr.uge.backpackhero.Jeu
    Records a notification message to be displayed by the graphical engine.

    O

    onClick(Jeu) - Method in record class fr.uge.backpackhero.donjon.Corridor
    Defines the interaction behavior when the user clicks on this room.
    onClick(Jeu) - Method in record class fr.uge.backpackhero.donjon.EnemyRoom
    Triggers a combat session if at least one enemy in the room is alive.
    onClick(Jeu) - Method in record class fr.uge.backpackhero.donjon.EventRoom
    Triggers the room's random effect through the game controller when clicked.
    onClick(Jeu) - Method in record class fr.uge.backpackhero.donjon.ExitRoom
    Triggers the transition to the next dungeon floor or the victory state.
    onClick(Jeu) - Method in record class fr.uge.backpackhero.donjon.GateRoom
    Attempts to unlock the gate when the player clicks on it.
    onClick(Jeu) - Method in record class fr.uge.backpackhero.donjon.HealerRoom
    Transitions the game state to the healing menu when the player clicks the room.
    onClick(Jeu) - Method in record class fr.uge.backpackhero.donjon.MerchantRoom
    Switches the game mode to the shop interface when clicked.
    onClick(Jeu) - Method in interface fr.uge.backpackhero.donjon.Room
    Defines the interaction behavior when the user clicks on this room.
    onClick(Jeu) - Method in record class fr.uge.backpackhero.donjon.TreasureRoom
    Triggers the loot collection process when the player clicks on the chest.
    ouvrir(Heros, MerchantRoom, Scanner) - Static method in class fr.uge.backpackhero.MenuMarchand
    Opens the merchant interaction menu and manages the shopping loop.
    ouvrir(Heros, Scanner) - Static method in class fr.uge.backpackhero.MenuGuerisseur
    Opens the healer interaction menu and starts the input loop.

    P

    payer(int) - Method in class fr.uge.backpackhero.entites.Heros

    The game is over because the hero's health points reached zero.

    Returns the value of the pos record component.

    Gold always occupies exactly one grid position.

    Returns the relative grid positions occupied by this item.

    Position - Record Class in fr.uge.backpackhero.item
    Represents a set of coordinates (row and column) used to locate items within the BackPack or to define the relative shape of an item.

    Compact constructor.

    Returns the value of the price record component.

    Curses have no monetary value.
    price() - Method in record class fr.uge.backpackhero.item.Gold
    Gold cannot be sold or bought as an item.

    Returns the price of this item when bought or sold.

    Returns the value of the price record component.

    Rage: Increases the damage dealt by weapons by X.

    Generates a complete, random Item instance by first rolling a rarity and then selecting a corresponding item type.

    Compact constructor with validation.
    RARE - Enum constant in enum class fr.uge.backpackhero.item.Rarity
    Items that are difficult to find, possessing valuable stats.

    Returns the value of the rarity record component.

    Gold has a common rarity.

    Returns the rarity of this item.
    rarity() - Method in record class fr.uge.backpackhero.item.MagicItem
    Returns the value of the rarity record component.

    Returns the value of the rarity record component.

    rarity() - Method in enum class fr.uge.backpackhero.item.Stuff

    Rarity - Enum Class in fr.uge.backpackhero.item
    Represents the rarity level of an item, influencing its value, power, and appearance frequency in the game.
    RARITY_WEIGHTS - Static variable in class fr.uge.backpackhero.item.StuffFactory
    Defines the weighted probability for drawing a specific rarity.
    RatLoupBehavior - Class in fr.uge.backpackhero.combat
    Defines the behavior for rat-loup enemies.
    RatLoupBehavior(int, int, int, int) - Constructor for class fr.uge.backpackhero.combat.RatLoupBehavior
    Constructs a behavior with specific range values for combat actions.
    recevoirDegats(int) - Method in class fr.uge.backpackhero.entites.Ennemi
    Processes damage intake, considering protection and dodge effects.
    recevoirDegats(int) - Method in class fr.uge.backpackhero.entites.Heros
    Processes damage intake, handling protection and Dodge charges.
    recordScore(ScoreEntry) - Method in class fr.uge.backpackhero.data.HallOfFame
    Records a new score and updates the top 3 rankings.
    refuseCurseImmediate() - Method in class fr.uge.backpackhero.entites.Heros
     
    REGEN - Enum constant in enum class fr.uge.backpackhero.combat.Effect
    Regeneration: Restores X health points at the start of the turn.
    removeAllItems() - Method in class fr.uge.backpackhero.item.BackPack
    Removes all items from the backpack and resets their internal positions.
    removeItem(ItemInstance) - Method in class fr.uge.backpackhero.item.BackPack
    Removes an ItemInstance from the backpack and clears its tiles.
    render(Graphics2D, ScreenInfo) - Method in class fr.uge.backpackhero.graphics.ViewGraphic
    Renders the current interaction UI overlay.
    reorganize() - Method in class fr.uge.backpackhero.graphics.ViewGraphic
    Switches the interface to reorganization mode by removing all items from the bag.
    REORGANIZE - Enum constant in enum class fr.uge.backpackhero.graphics.ViewGraphic.InteractionMode
     
    revealRoom(int, int) - Method in class fr.uge.backpackhero.donjon.Floor
    Marks a specific room as explored.
    Room - Interface in fr.uge.backpackhero.donjon
    A sealed interface representing a cell or room on the dungeon map.
    rotatable() - Method in interface fr.uge.backpackhero.item.Item
    Indicates whether this item can be rotated in the backpack.
    rotate() - Method in class fr.uge.backpackhero.item.ItemInstance
    Rotates the item by 90 degrees clockwise.
    RoughBuckler - Enum constant in enum class fr.uge.backpackhero.item.Stuff
    A common shield.
    row() - Method in record class fr.uge.backpackhero.donjon.PositionInDungeon
    Returns the value of the row record component.
    row() - Method in record class fr.uge.backpackhero.item.Position
    Returns the value of the row record component.

    S

    score() - Method in record class fr.uge.backpackhero.data.ScoreEntry
    Returns the value of the score record component.
    ScoreEntry - Record Class in fr.uge.backpackhero.data
    Represents a single entry in the Hall of Fame.
    ScoreEntry(String, int) - Constructor for record class fr.uge.backpackhero.data.ScoreEntry
    Compact constructor that ensures the player name is not null.
    setMode(Mode) - Method in class fr.uge.backpackhero.Jeu
     
    setPos(Position) - Method in class fr.uge.backpackhero.item.ItemInstance
    Sets the anchor position of this item instance within the backpack.
    shapeAtRotation(int) - Method in interface fr.uge.backpackhero.item.Item
    Calculates the rotated shape of the item according to the rotation angle.
    Shield - Record Class in fr.uge.backpackhero.item
    Represents a defensive item that provides protection during combat.
    Shield(String, List, Rarity, int, int, int) - Constructor for record class fr.uge.backpackhero.item.Shield
    Compact constructor with validation.
    ShortArrow - Enum constant in enum class fr.uge.backpackhero.item.Stuff
    A common consumable item (implied, based on name).
    SLOW - Enum constant in enum class fr.uge.backpackhero.combat.Effect
    Slow: Decreases the block amount provided by items by X.
    soigner(int) - Method in class fr.uge.backpackhero.entites.Heros
     
    SOIN - Enum constant in enum class fr.uge.backpackhero.Mode
    The hero is currently interacting with a healer to restore health.
    spendGold(int) - Method in class fr.uge.backpackhero.item.BackPack
    Attempts to spend gold.
    stacks() - Method in record class fr.uge.backpackhero.combat.StatusEffectAction
    Returns the value of the stacks record component.
    start() - Method in class fr.uge.backpackhero.graphics.GraphicEngine
    Launches the main application loop.
    startEnemyTurn() - Method in class fr.uge.backpackhero.combat.Combat
    Processes enemy actions and ends the turn.
    startHeroTurn() - Method in class fr.uge.backpackhero.combat.Combat
    Starts the hero's turn by resetting energy and planning enemy actions.
    startX() - Method in class fr.uge.backpackhero.donjon.Floor
     
    startY() - Method in class fr.uge.backpackhero.donjon.Floor
     
    stats() - Method in record class fr.uge.backpackhero.item.Armor
    Returns the value of the stats record component.
    stats() - Method in record class fr.uge.backpackhero.item.Arrow
    Returns the value of the stats record component.
    stats() - Method in record class fr.uge.backpackhero.item.MagicItem
    Returns the value of the stats record component.
    stats() - Method in record class fr.uge.backpackhero.item.ManaStone
    Returns the value of the stats record component.
    stats() - Method in record class fr.uge.backpackhero.item.MeleeWeapon
    Returns the value of the stats record component.
    stats() - Method in record class fr.uge.backpackhero.item.Shield
    Returns the value of the stats record component.
    StatusEffectAction - Record Class in fr.uge.backpackhero.combat
    Represents the intention of an enemy to apply a status effect.
    StatusEffectAction(Effect, int) - Constructor for record class fr.uge.backpackhero.combat.StatusEffectAction
    Compact constructor that ensures the status effect data is valid.
    stock() - Method in record class fr.uge.backpackhero.donjon.MerchantRoom
    Returns the value of the stock record component.
    Stuff - Enum Class in fr.uge.backpackhero.item
    Enumeration listing all known item types available for generation in the game.
    StuffFactory - Class in fr.uge.backpackhero.item
    A factory class responsible for creating concrete Item objects based on a weighted rarity distribution and item type Stuff.
    StuffFactory() - Constructor for class fr.uge.backpackhero.item.StuffFactory
    Creates a new instance of the StuffFactory.

    T

    takeDamage(int) - Method in class fr.uge.backpackhero.entites.Heros
     
    toString() - Method in record class fr.uge.backpackhero.combat.AttackAction

    triggerEffect(Jeu) - Method in record class fr.uge.backpackhero.donjon.EventRoom
    Triggers a randomized effect on the hero, such as gaining gold or taking damage.
    triggerEndTurnEffects() - Method in class fr.uge.backpackhero.entites.Ennemi
    Triggers poison and decreases status stacks at the end of the turn.

    Processes end-of-turn status effects like Poison.
    triggerStartTurnEffects() - Method in class fr.uge.backpackhero.entites.Ennemi
    Triggers regeneration and burn effects at the start of the turn.
    triggerStartTurnEffects() - Method in class fr.uge.backpackhero.entites.Heros
    Triggers effects like regeneration or burn at the start of the turn.

    U

    Items slightly less common, often with moderate stats.

    Defines the active usage of the item during combat.

    ViewGraphic - Class in fr.uge.backpackhero.graphics
    Manages graphical interactions related to the backpack, such as item placement, reorganization, level-up expansions, and curse handling.
    ViewGraphic(BackPack, Heros) - Constructor for class fr.uge.backpackhero.graphics.ViewGraphic
    Constructs the view with the required game components.
    ViewGraphic.InteractionMode - Enum Class in fr.uge.backpackhero.graphics
    Interaction modes for the UI.
